name: The Crescent
approxRentRange: $2,190-$2,400/month (2BR/2BA, ~963 sq ft; individual units rented by owners vary)
bathroomsNote: 1BR units: 1 bath (~800-805 sq ft). 2BR units: 2 baths (~963 sq ft). No 1BR+den floor plan confirmed.

notes.doormanDetail: Multiple sources confirm concierge service 7 days/week. No source specifies 24-hour staffing hours, so rated 'Likely staffed' rather than 'Confirmed 24h.'
notes.buildingDetail: 14-story condominium building completed 2006/occupancy March 2007, with 143 units in Downtown Silver Spring (Fenton Village). Units are individually owned and some are rented out, so lease terms and finishes vary by owner.
notes.amenities: Fitness center, billiard room, resident lounge, shared patio/courtyard with outdoor seating and grilling station, game room, conference/meeting room, bike storage, assigned underground garage parking. No pool.
notes.wellMaintained: One Yelp review from a former long-term resident cited safety concerns, cockroaches, a 15-day gas outage, and water damage. No corroborating reviews found to confirm or contradict. Building last updated on Yelp April 2026.
notes.pets: Pet-friendly; specific breed/weight restrictions not confirmed in reviewed sources.
notes.climate: Air conditioning and heat confirmed; at least one source notes heat included in rent/HOA. Individual unit control implied by standard condo arrangement.
notes.rentNote: Building is condominiums; rental units are owner-listed individually. VeryApt shows 1BR from $1,780 and 2BR from $2,190; Compass and ApartmentList show 2BR at $2,400/month. Prices reflect individual owner decisions and vary.
